titleStmt.title: SII 9.41: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 41. (A.R. No. 242 of 1913.) ON A ROCK IN A FIELD AT NELAPALLI, PUNGANUR ZAMINDARI, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record which is not dated belongs to the reign of the Noḻamba-Pallava chief Iṟivanoḻamba Ghaṭeyaṅkakāṟa-Pallavāditya, whose genealogy from Iṟivanoḻamba I is narrated. The former is said to have bestowed, when he was in Venduṟu-Ponne in Paṟuvi-nāḍu, royal honours, such as a horse to ride, an umbrella, āḷapaṇṭuvake, kuñcha, taḷige, kīḻvaṭṭa, aḍḍaṇige and gaddige on Karavayya, son of Gavaṟeseṭṭi, a Baḷigāṟa. The chief named him Mummaḍi-Gavaṟe-Pallavāditya-Noḻambaseṭṭi and granted to him as a koḍaṅge the town Koḷatūra in Pulināḍu, which was surnamed Pallavādityapura. The boundaries of the village are specified. The writer of the record was Chandimayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vvā yō harētu vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariṣassāhaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
svasti . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvīvalla
bhaṁ pallavakulatilakanē
kavākyaṁ śrīmadiṟivanoḻamba
nātana magaṁ nanninoḻaṁbanātana ma
gaṁ poḻalcōradēvanātana magaṁ vīrama
hēndranātana māgaṁ vākyadēvanātana ta
mmaniṟivanoḻaṁba ghaṭeyaṁkakāṟa pallavādityaṁ prithvīrājyaṁge
yyuttaṁ paṟuvināḍa venduṟupoṁneyaḷiḻdu koyatura baḷigā
ṟa(ra)ṁ rāmēśvaṟa harapallayyaṁ gavaṟeseṭṭiyā magaṁ karavayya
mummaḍigavaṟe pallavādityanoḻambaseṭṭiyendu pesaraṁ dayageydu paṭṭaṁgaṭṭi Ē
ṟakudure koḍe Āḷapaṇṭuvake kuñcantaḷige kīḻvaṭṭa Aḍḍaṇige gaddige rāja
cinnava koṭṭu Aṁkava(ṁ)nnōḍalpaḍedu pulināḍa koḷatūraṁ pallavā
dityapūravāge nakaraṁ māḍi vaiśyadattiyāge māḍi noḻaṁbaseṭṭi
ge koḍaṁgeyāge koṭṭaṁ caṁdrādityaruḷḷannegaṁ Ātana makkaḷamakkaḷu
varaṁ salvudumābhyāntaraśiddhayāge pūrvvasyāṁ diśigoṭalveṭṭu mēre Āgnēya
syāṁ diśi koyalēri kaṭṭu Antubare kōlēriya paḍuvaṇa deseya kallasēre Ante bare biḷiyaguṇḍu Antu ba
re mūṟupuṇiseya kuṇṭe Ante bare kuḍukuṟuke Ante bare puṇisebeya karggāla Antu bare paṭṭaṟe Irppa
Adaṟa tadanāntara maḻtigaḍapu Adaṟa tadanāntara paNḍivāra puṇise Adāṟa tadanantare yalleguyyal Adaṟa
tadanāntara polagiya muṭṭubeyiNda baḍagaluvaḷi mēre Adaṟa tadanantara pajaṇeya baḍaga gōḍiya ma
ḻtiyāla Adaṟa tadanāntara moḷageṟeyabe kallasereya kuNṭe Adaṟa tadanāntara muṭṭuṁbeyoḻpallayāla
Adaṟa tadanantara kaggallasereya niṭṭaṟe Adaṟa tadanāntara kuṇṭeya taḍagōḍa mēkeṟeyāla Adaṟa tadanāntara
mukuṭa Aladahāḷa Adaṟa tadanantara caikōla tāḻamara Adaṟa tadanāntara maṭṭaṟeya kuracigoṇḍa Adaṟa
tadanāntara kammāṟakaṇuve Adaṟa tadanantara piripallipāle Adaṟa tadanāntara paḍuvaṇa disābhā
gada keḷage Aṟiseṇe Adaṟa tadanāntara Eṇitoṇeya maṭṭaṟe Adaṟa tadanāntara beṁbuguḷpiya
ḍaṇa piriyaṟe Adaṟa tadanāntara peṟada sāsana māryyāde Adaṟa tadanāntara Agiḻiya pāḻoḷagō Ada
ṟa tadanāntara Aguliya kaṇuve Adaṟa tadanāntara pāṇakuṁṭṭeya kaṇuve Adaṟa tadanāntara sūralkuṁṭeya beṭṭu
Adaṟa tadanantara sūrakuṁṭe Adaṟa tadanantara keḍulakallu Adaṟa tadanāntara bhāgōḍa pannēriye maryyāde
pallavādityanoḻaṁbaseṭṭi kadaṁbara vikramādityana maga tamma Aḷiya beṁgaḍayyage koḍaṁgeyyāga koḷaceya
gaḻdeyanu tanna makkaḷu makkaḷuvaraṁ salvantāgi koṭṭa . bareda candimayya pallavādityanoḻaṁba
māravāge kaṇḍuga gaḻdeya koṭṭanavara
Digital edition of SII 9.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
